Frequently Asked Questions

How long does an Odoo ERP implementation take?

A typical Odoo ERP implementation takes between eight and sixteen weeks, depending on the number of modules, the amount of custom development, and how much historical data needs to be migrated.

What does an Odoo implementation cost?

Implementation costs typically range from fifteen thousand to eighty thousand dollars based on company size, module count, and integration complexity. We provide a fixed-scope quote after the discovery workshop.

Do you provide post-go-live support?
Yes. We offer monthly support retainers that cover bug fixes, user training refreshers, report tweaks, and minor configuration changes so your team always has an expert on call.
Which industries do you specialize in?
We have deep experience in manufacturing, wholesale distribution, retail, and professional services, with dedicated playbooks for each vertical.
